summary: Completed comprehensive testing of support ticket system. Backend APIs are functional, frontend components are properly integrated, and admin dashboard is working. All core features are operational including ticket creation, admin management, and Telegram notifications queue.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_issues.impact: Minor - correct behavior but different status code

passed_tests: Support categories API returns 6 categories (order, payment, delivery, product, technical, other)
Support ticket creation with authentication works correctly
Admin status updates for tickets working
FAB (Floating Action Button) contains 4 buttons including support (orange)
Support modal shows login prompt for unauthorized users
Support modal shows 6 categories for authenticated users
Support form validation and submission working
Admin panel support tab accessible and functional
Support dashboard loads with stats cards and ticket management
Telegram notification queue integration working (tickets queued to admin_alerts_queue)
